pae.ext-authenticator:
<#if tx\-period?has_content>
                ${tx\-period}
              </#if>
              <#if initiate\-authentication\-request?has_content>
                ${initiate\-authentication\-request}
              </#if>
              <#if handshake\-enable?has_content>
                ${handshake\-enable}
              </#if>
              <#if handshake\-period?has_content>
                ${handshake\-period}
              </#if>
              <#if authentication\-mode?has_content>
                ${authentication\-mode}
              </#if>
              <#if authentication\-mode == "mac-based" && max\-mac\-addresses?has_content>
                ${max\-mac\-addresses}
              </#if>
              <#if interface\-supplicant\-timeout?has_content>
                ${interface\-supplicant\-timeout}
              </#if>
